title: BugReported payload
description: Emitted when a new bug is filed via forge(schema_name='bug', ...). Captures the create-time field values; mirrors the bug forge-schema. Subsequent mutations emit their own typed events (BugTriaged, BugResolved, BugReopened). The bug's entity reference is in the envelope; this schema covers payload-only.

title.description: Short human description — one line, sentence-style. Mirrors bug.toml's title field. Required at file-time.

problem_statement.description: What was observed: behavior, symptom, reproduction steps. Mirrors bug.toml's problem_statement.

surface.description: Subsystem / crate / concept the bug lives in. Comma-separated lowercase-kebab tags ('seed-mcp,library,bug_list'). Convention matches bug.toml — see its description for the matching semantics in bug_list.

severity.description: Accepted values: low, medium, high. null when the caller omitted severity; the forge writer defaults to medium downstream. Enum validation here mirrors the downstream check in the bug handler.

source.description: Where the bug was surfaced — session identifier, verification run name, chain slug, or free-form note. Mirrors bug.toml's source.

tags.description: Categorical labels. Comma-separated, lowercase-kebab, no spaces. Same convention as surface. Captured as the string the caller sent (the validator may join a list to a string upstream).

acceptance_criteria.description: What 'fixed' looks like. Accepts a list of strings (one bullet per criterion) or a single string (coerced to a 1-element list upstream). Optional at file-time; can be filled in later. Mirrors bug.toml.

constraints.description: Scope limits — don't-over-fix notes, boundaries the fix must respect. Paragraph prose. Mirrors bug.toml.

qwen_task_id.description: Added 2026-05-20 via T3 of agent-substrate-crud-retirement (§9.5 audit finding). Optional pointer to the qwen-invocation row that surfaced this bug — populated when the bug was filed by the arc-close-filing pipeline; null for human-filed bugs. Mirrors the bugs.qwen_task_id CRUD column (migration 023) so payload-only fold reconstruction can recover it without joining.

routed_suggestion_slug.description: Added 2026-05-20 via T3 of agent-substrate-crud-retirement (§9.5 audit finding). Optional cross-routing slug pointing at a sibling suggestion this bug emerged from. Default empty string ''; mirrors the bugs.routed_suggestion_slug CRUD column added by migration 054 (agent-suggestion-box). Payload-only fold reconstruction recovers this without joining.
